title: T-043 — ZPL label generation + print endpoint (WH §15.1, §15.3)
prompt:
# T-043 — ZPL label generation + print endpoint (WH §15.1, §15.3)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §15.1, §15.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement ZPL renderer for 4×6" LP label (Code 128 + QR + product/qty/batch/expiry/location/date_code) and `POST /api/warehouse/license-plates/:id/print-label` sending ZPL to printer over TCP:9100 (configurable). Print-on-receipt option supported.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/zpl-renderer.ts`: function `renderLpLabelZpl({lp}): string` producing valid ZPL II per template (Code128 LP_number, QR LP URL, product code/name, qty+UoM+CW, batch+supplier_batch, expiry red ≤7d, location, date_code, operator).
2. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/license-plates/[id]/print-label/route.ts`: POST → render → send via printer-service-client (TCP socket to printer.ip:port from warehouse_settings printer config).
3. Pre-check: printer online (last_heartbeat < 60 s) else queue or reject per V-WH-LABEL-003.
4. Copies: settings.label_copies_default or per-call override (1-10 range V-WH-LABEL-004).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/zpl-renderer.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/license-plates/[id]/print-label/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/zpl-renderer.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an LP with all fields, when `renderLpLabelZpl` runs, then output starts with `^XA` and ends with `^XZ`, contains a `^BCN` (Code128) with LP number, and a `^BQN` (QR) with the LP URL.
2. Given expiry_date is within 7 days, when rendered, then a `^FR` red-text invert or marker is present.
3. Given copies=15, when POST, then validation rejects (V-WH-LABEL-004).
4. Given printer offline + queue=false, when POST, then 409 with `printer_offline=true`.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/zpl-renderer.test.ts` asserting ZPL syntax + AI presence + copies gate + offline path.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test zpl-renderer`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip printer-online check (V-WH-LABEL-003).
- Do not embed HTML or non-ZPL escape sequences.
- Do not allow copies > 10.

## Dependencies
- T-002
- T-009
